testcase.name: test_assistant_can_create_appointment
testcase.failure: tests/test_assistant_role.py:361: in test_assistant_can_create_appointment assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 400: {"detail":"Time slot already booked. Please choose a different time."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_assistant_cannot_send_messages
testcase.failure: tests/test_assistant_role.py:450: in test_assistant_cannot_send_messages assert response.status_code in [403, 400, 401], f"Expected 403/400/401 for messages, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403/400/401 for messages, got 200: {"id":"fe8d6f56-21d0-4cf6-b17a-201150da2552","sender_id":"a3d49b60-e0ef-4991-a36c-1b5c78a39507","sender_name":"TEST_Access Assistant","recipient_id":"c283749c-2c50-48d7-94bf-e4588247883d","recipient_name":"Test Client Alpha","content":"TEST message from assistant","read":false,"created_at":"2026-01-18T13:22:27.113983Z"} E assert 200 in [403, 400, 401] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_assistant_cannot_reassign_client
testcase.failure: tests/test_assistant_role.py:496: in test_assistant_cannot_reassign_client assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 for reassigning client, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 for reassigning client, got 404: {"detail":"Client not found or not assigned to you"} E assert 404 == 403 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
